name: Waitlist Page
description: 极简产品预发布落地页, 含邮箱捕获、logo、装饰图层
usage: 【模板: 等候名单页 / Waitlist】 极简产品预发布落地页, 含邮箱捕获、logo、装饰图层
trigger_terms: 极简产品预发布落地页, 含邮箱捕获、logo、装饰图层
best_for: 极简产品预发布落地页, 含邮箱捕获、logo、装饰图层
Requests that need web pages and product prototypes.
Use when the user asks for 等候名单页.
avoid_for: Requests unrelated to this template category or scenario.
Cases where the user explicitly asks for a different medium, layout, or visual style.
layout_rules: 居中布局: brand logo + 一行 tagline + 大字 hero (说清楚做什么)
邮箱捕获 input + submit 按钮 (合并成一个 pill)
下方 3 个小卖点 (icon + 一行字)
底部 founders note + 社交链接
style_rules: 装饰: SVG 渐变 mesh / 噪点纹理 / 一颗星轨
成功提交后给一个微动效 (✓ + 文案变化)
content_rules: 成功提交后给一个微动效 (✓ + 文案变化)
居中布局: brand logo + 一行 tagline + 大字 hero (说清楚做什么)
邮箱捕获 input + submit 按钮 (合并成一个 pill)

quality_checks: Use the reference HTML as a style and structure guide, not as final placeholder content.
Preserve user-provided facts, numbers, dates, and claims.
Return one complete standalone HTML file with no markdown wrapper.
Keep visible text readable and avoid overlapping UI or content blocks.
